0.response: {"Q0":"Apart from the obvious, not collecting anymore blue gems after respective astronaut left. I'd make a mental note of which \"dimension,\" I should fixate on (relative to screen position so I'm ready to press A / S] "}

8.response: {"Q0":"Not in particular. As the first prompt stated, after a while, muscle memory kicked in for which keys to press. "}

4.response: {"Q0":"Yes, I never dug form the blue planet after he left."}

11.response: {"Q0":"Feel like there was a hard cap in gold to real currency conversion, it'd have been nice to know what the ratio was and whether it changes based on how much gold one has collected. That said, I understand that this would most likely cause those taking the study to lose motivation after a certain point. "}
